migrations.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS emp_eventdef_ext (
       code VARCHAR(64) PRIMARY KEY,
       catalog VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL,
       section VARCHAR(64),
       operator_hint VARCHAR(512),
       time_type VARCHAR(8));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS emp_setup_tag (
       tag VARCHAR(16) PRIMARY KEY,
       name VARCHAR(128),
       description VARCHAR(512),
       sort_order INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 100)

source.body: {"steps": [{"type": "selectMany", "var": "defs", "sql": "SELECT d.code, d.name, d.event_class, COALESCE(x.catalog, '') AS catalog, COALESCE(x.section, '') AS section, COALESCE(x.operator_hint, '') AS operator_hint, d.requires_length, d.requires_time, d.requires_comment, d.oee_bucket, COALESCE(d.six_big_loss, '') AS six_big_loss, d.sort_order FROM emc_operations_event_definition d LEFT JOIN emp_eventdef_ext x ON x.code = d.code WHERE (? = '' OR x.section = ?) AND (? = '' OR x.catalog = ?) ORDER BY d.sort_order, d.code", "params": ["${input.section}", "${input.section}", "${input.catalog}", "${input.catalog}"]}, {"type": "map", "var": "rows", "source": "${defs}", "fields": {"code": "${item.code}", "name": "${item.name}", "eventClass": "${item.event_class}", "catalog": "${item.catalog}", "section": "${item.section}", "operatorHint": "${item.operator_hint}", "requiresLength": "${item.requires_length}", "requiresTime": "${item.requires_time}", "requiresComment": "${item.requires_comment}", "oeeBucket": "${item.oee_bucket}", "sixBigLoss": "${item.six_big_loss}", "sortOrder": "${item.sort_order}"}}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "rows": "${rows}"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "selectMany", "var": "lots", "sql": "SELECT l.lot_id, l.barcode, l.definition_id, l.status, COALESCE(l.storage_location, '') AS storage_location, l.quantity, l.base_uom, l.length_m, l.weight_kg, COALESCE(w.prop_value, '') AS width_mm, COALESCE(t.prop_value, '') AS thickness_mkm FROM emc_material_lot l LEFT JOIN emc_material_lot_property w ON w.lot_id = l.lot_id AND w.prop_key = 'width_mm' LEFT JOIN emc_material_lot_property t ON t.lot_id = l.lot_id AND t.prop_key = 'thickness_mkm' WHERE (? = '' OR l.definition_id = ?) ORDER BY l.lot_id", "params": ["${input.definitionId}", "${input.definitionId}"]}, {"type": "map", "var": "rows", "source": "${lots}", "fields": {"lotId": "${item.lot_id}", "barcode": "${item.barcode}", "definitionId": "${item.definition_id}", "status": "${item.status}", "location": "${item.storage_location}", "quantity": "${item.quantity}", "uom": "${item.base_uom}", "lengthM": "${item.length_m}", "weightKg": "${item.weight_kg}", "widthMm": "${item.width_mm}", "thicknessMkm": "${item.thickness_mkm}"}}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "rows": "${rows}"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "selectMany", "var": "tags", "sql": "SELECT tag, COALESCE(name, '') AS name, COALESCE(description, '') AS description, sort_order FROM emp_setup_tag ORDER BY sort_order"}, {"type": "map", "var": "rows", "source": "${tags}", "fields": {"tag": "${item.tag}", "name": "${item.name}", "description": "${item.description}", "sortOrder": "${item.sort_order}"}}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "rows": "${rows}"}}]}

dashboards.title: События и простои
dashboards.layoutJson:
{"columns": 84, "rowHeight": 8, "widgets": [{"key": "downtime", "type": "report", "title": "Downtime by Code", "x": 0, "y": 0, "w": 54, "h": 40, "id": "downtime", "reportPath": "root.platform.reports.emp-downtime-by-code", "pageSize": 25}, {"key": "defs", "type": "function-form", "title": "Event Catalog", "x": 54, "y": 0, "w": 30, "h": 12, "id": "defs", "objectPath": "root.platform.singleton-blueprints.erp-mes-printing-hub-v1", "functionName": "emp_eventdef_list", "buttonLabel": "Filter", "fieldsJson": "[{\"name\": \"section\", \"label\": \"Section ('' = all)\", \"type\": \"text\", \"default\": \"\"}, {\"name\": \"catalog\", \"label\": \"Catalog (OGP/BM/POUCH/MES)\", \"type\": \"text\", \"default\": \"OGP\"}]"}, {"key": "zeropull", "type": "html-snippet", "title": "Zero Pull tags", "x": 54, "y": 12, "w": 30, "h": 18, "id": "zeropull", "htmlJson": "{\"html\": \"

Zero Pull

Repeated setup attempts at code OGP-120 are tagged with Zero Pull reasons (dictionary emp_setup_tag, function emp_setuptag_list):

  • Zerropull – first setup pass / planned check
  • A–E – print quality out of spec (grammage, viscosity, density, ΔE, standard)
  • F–K – ink contamination, machine state, registration, cylinder, doctor blade
  • L–N – other print defects / material-caused / comment required
  • P – check passed, no deviation found
\"}", "html": "

Zero Pull

Repeated setup attempts at code OGP-120 are tagged with Zero Pull reasons (dictionary emp_setup_tag, function emp_setuptag_list):

  • Zerropull – first setup pass / planned check
  • A–E – print quality out of spec (grammage, viscosity, density, ΔE, standard)
  • F–K – ink contamination, machine state, registration, cylinder, doctor blade
  • L–N – other print defects / material-caused / comment required
  • P – check passed, no deviation found
"}]}

bindings.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS v FROM emc_operations_event e JOIN emc_operations_event_definition d ON d.code = e.definition_code WHERE e.status = 'OPEN' AND d.oee_bucket = 'AVAILABILITY' AND e.equipment_id IN ('PR120', 'PR130', 'LM210', 'SL300', 'RW100')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS v FROM emc_job_order WHERE dispatch_status = 'RUNNING' AND equipment_id IN ('PR120', 'PR130', 'LM210', 'SL300', 'RW100')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS v FROM emc_material_lot WHERE status = 'STOCK' AND length_m IS NOT NULL AND length_m < 500

reports.title: Print Job Board (ISA-95 Job Orders)
reports.description: Active job orders on printing equipment with dispatch status (Part 4 job list).
reports.query:
SELECT o.job_order_id AS id, o.job_no, COALESCE(s.external_ref, '') AS external_ref,
       COALESCE(o.command, '') AS command, o.dispatch_status, o.equipment_id,
       COALESCE(r.product_definition_id, '') AS product_definition_id, r.quantity, COALESCE(r.uom, '') AS uom,
       o.planned_start, o.planned_end, o.created_at
FROM emc_job_order o
JOIN emc_work_request r ON r.request_id = o.request_id
JOIN emc_work_schedule s ON s.schedule_id = r.schedule_id
WHERE o.dispatch_status NOT IN ('ENDED', 'ABORTED', 'CANCELLED')
  AND o.equipment_id IN ('PR120', 'PR130', 'LM210', 'SL300', 'RW100')
ORDER BY o.planned_start ASC, o.job_no

reports.title: Downtime by Event Code (Flexibase catalog)
reports.description: Operations events aggregated by definition code with Flexibase section.
reports.query:
SELECT d.code, d.name, COALESCE(x.section, '') AS section, COUNT(*) AS events,
       COALESCE(SUM(e.time_min), 0) AS total_time_min
FROM emc_operations_event e
JOIN emc_operations_event_definition d ON d.code = e.definition_code
LEFT JOIN emp_eventdef_ext x ON x.code = d.code
WHERE e.status IN ('OPEN', 'CLOSED')
GROUP BY d.code, d.name, x.section
ORDER BY total_time_min DESC, d.code

reports.title: Roll & Material Stock
reports.description: Material lots (rolls and ink cans) with roll dimensions from lot properties.
reports.query:
SELECT l.lot_id, l.barcode, l.definition_id AS material_id, COALESCE(d.class_id, '') AS class_id,
       l.status, COALESCE(l.storage_location, '') AS storage_location,
       l.quantity, l.base_uom AS uom, l.length_m, l.weight_kg,
       COALESCE(w.prop_value, '') AS width_mm, COALESCE(t.prop_value, '') AS thickness_mkm
FROM emc_material_lot l
JOIN emc_material_definition d ON d.definition_id = l.definition_id
LEFT JOIN emc_material_lot_property w ON w.lot_id = l.lot_id AND w.prop_key = 'width_mm'
LEFT JOIN emc_material_lot_property t ON t.lot_id = l.lot_id AND t.prop_key = 'thickness_mkm'
ORDER BY l.lot_id

metadata.changelog: 1.0.1 - Flatten dashboard widget settingsJson to top-level fields (reportPath, objectPath, functionName) so operator UI works without web-console settingsJson expansion.
